description: Union Controlplane health and service metrics

panels.title: Service Availability
panels.description: Percentage of deployments with all requested replicas available. 1.0 = all healthy.

panels.title: Pod Restarts (1h)
panels.description: Total container restarts in the last hour. Non-zero indicates crashlooping or OOM kills.

panels.title: Connect Error Rate
panels.description: Fraction of Connect RPC responses with non-OK/non-Canceled codes across all CP services.

panels.title: Connect Request Rate by Service
panels.description: Connect protocol request throughput broken down by service (e.g. ExecutionService, ClusterService).

panels.title: Connect Errors by Code
panels.description: Connect error responses by gRPC status code (Internal, Unavailable, etc.).

panels.title: Handler Panics
panels.description: Total handler panics across all CP services. Any non-zero value indicates a service caught a panic during request handling.

panels.title: Service Availability
panels.description: Current service availability across all deployments.

panels.title: Error Budget Remaining
panels.description: Fraction of error budget remaining. <0 = budget exhausted. Requires monitoring.slos.enabled.

panels.title: Ingress Success Rate
panels.description: Ingress success rate (non-5xx). Customer-facing SLO metric. Falls back to raw metric if SLO recording rules are not enabled.

panels.title: Ingress Latency p99
panels.description: Ingress p99 latency. Falls back to raw metric if SLO recording rules are not enabled.

panels.title: Availability Over Time
panels.description: Service availability over time with SLO target line.

panels.title: Error Budget Burn Rate
panels.description: Error budget remaining over time. Requires monitoring.slos.enabled.

panels.title: Request Rate by Path
panels.description: Ingress request rate broken down by host and URL path.

panels.title: Error Rate by Status Code
panels.description: 4xx and 5xx error rates from ingress-nginx by HTTP status code.

panels.title: Latency p50 / p95 / p99
panels.description: Ingress request latency percentiles. Includes TLS + routing + upstream response time.

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: Current number of active client connections to ingress-nginx.

panels.title: Connect Request Rate by Service
panels.description: Connect protocol request throughput broken down by service (e.g. ExecutionService, ClusterService).

panels.title: Connect Errors by Service & Code
panels.description: Connect errors broken down by service and gRPC code. Identifies which services are erroring.

panels.title: gRPC Server Request Rate (CacheService)
panels.description: CacheService is the only CP service using gRPC (not Connect). Shows Get/Put/Delete/Reservation rates.

panels.title: gRPC Server Errors (CacheService)
panels.description: CacheService gRPC errors by method and code.

panels.title: Active Executions
panels.description: Current count of active workflow, node, and task executions tracked by FlyteAdmin.

panels.title: Execution Create / Event Rate
panels.description: Rate of execution creations and event ingestion (workflow, node, task events from propeller).

panels.title: Errors
panels.description: FlyteAdmin error rates: propeller communication failures, model transform errors, notification publish failures.

panels.title: Endpoint Latency (p95)
panels.description: FlyteAdmin gRPC endpoint latency at p95. Key endpoints: CreateExecution, CreateExecutionEvent, GetExecution.

panels.title: Auth Middleware Decisions
panels.description: Authorization approve/deny rate from the FlyteAdmin auth middleware. High deny rate may indicate auth misconfiguration.

panels.title: DB Operation Rate
panels.description: Execution operations DB latency: create, ack, claim, unclaim, get, update.

panels.title: DB Errors
panels.description: Executions service Postgres error rates by type: gorm errors, native postgres errors, not-found.

panels.title: Cluster Cache Hit/Miss
panels.description: Cluster and nodepool list cache effectiveness. High miss rate = excessive DB queries.

panels.title: Apps — Pending Assignments
panels.description: Number of apps waiting for cluster assignment. Growing backlog = scheduling bottleneck.

panels.title: Apps — First Ack Latency
panels.description: Key V2 SLI: time to deliver an app to the dataplane. Measures end-to-end scheduling latency.

panels.title: V2 Run Dispatch
panels.description: V2 run/action dispatch throughput. Enqueue failures indicate queue service issues.

panels.title: V2 Run Notifier
panels.description: V2 notification pipeline: notifications sent per second, active subscribers, log bytes streamed.

panels.title: Metadata Store Counts
panels.description: Total and scheduled run/action counts in the queue. Shows system load.

panels.title: Scheduler / Runner / Aborter Throughput
panels.description: Lease lifecycle throughput: enqueued (new), completed (done), aborted (cancelled).

panels.title: Queue Lengths
panels.description: Internal queue depths across scheduler, runner, aborter, dispatcher, and DB worker pool. Growing = backpressure.

panels.title: Dispatcher Operation Duration (p99)
panels.description: Dispatcher multi-step operation chain execution time at p99, by operation type.

panels.title: State Get/Put Duration (p99)
panels.description: In-memory state store operation latency. Backed by ScyllaDB persistence.

panels.title: State Cache & Eventer
panels.description: Active/terminal state counts and eventer error rate. Eventer reports action status to executions service.

panels.title: Worker Capacity
panels.description: Remaining execution capacity per connected DP worker. Zero = worker saturated.

panels.title: Dispatcher Failures by Type
panels.description: Failed dispatcher operations by Go type. Indicates internal queue service errors.

panels.title: DB & Client Thread Pool
panels.description: Idle worker goroutines in DB, queue-client, and state-client pools. Zero = all threads busy.

panels.title: UpdateStatus / Heartbeat Rate
panels.description: Rate of DP cluster status updates and heartbeats received by the cluster service.

panels.title: Cluster API Latency (p99)
panels.description: Cluster service RPC latency for UpdateStatus and Heartbeat calls.

panels.title: Operator / Propeller Restarts (from DP)
panels.description: DP-reported restart counts for operator and propeller pods. Set by DP on each UpdateStatus call.

panels.title: DB Errors by Type
panels.description: Cluster service Postgres error rates by type: gorm errors, native postgres errors, not-found.

panels.title: Cluster Health Status
panels.description: Cluster health collector: 1=unhealthy, 0=healthy. Emitted per cluster on every Prometheus scrape.

panels.title: Last Heartbeat Age (stale cluster detection)
panels.description: Seconds since each cluster last sent a heartbeat. High values = stale/disconnected cluster.

panels.title: Managed Cluster Cache
panels.description: LRU cache hit/miss rate for managed cluster lookups. High miss rate = excessive DB queries.

panels.title: Cache Hit / Miss Rate
panels.description: CacheService hit/miss rate. Hits = cached task output reused. Misses = task must execute. Get failures = storage errors. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: Reservation Contention & Operations
panels.description: Cache reservation contention: how often workers are blocked waiting for another worker's cache computation. High contention = many workers computing the same task. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

targets.expr: (sum by (identity_type) (rate(authorizer:authorizer:cloudauthorizer:connect:authz_denied{namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum by (identity_type) (rate(authorizer:authorizer:cloudauthorizer:connect:authz_allowed{namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum by (identity_type) (rate(authorizer:authorizer:cloudauthorizer:connect:authz_denied{namespace="$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]))), 1e-10)

panels.title: Cache Hit/Miss Rates
panels.description: DataProxy internal cache effectiveness for domain resolution, cluster pool routing, and namespace mapping.

panels.title: Image Read Latency (p95)
panels.description: Time to read image metadata from the dataplane, proxied through DataProxy.

panels.title: Secret Proxy Errors by Cluster
panels.description: Per-cluster secret proxy errors during fan-out operations. Identifies which dataplane cluster is causing failures. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: Billable Usage Reports
panels.description: Rate of ReportBillableUsage calls from DP clusters. Each call reports resource consumption for billing.

panels.title: Message Pipeline
panels.description: SQS/queue message processing: received, sent (success), failed, dropped (max retries exceeded).

panels.title: Messages by Type (success)
panels.description: Successful message processing rate by type: node_execution, workflow_execution, billable_usage, serverless_billable_usage. [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: Message Processing Latency
panels.description: Time to process individual queue messages. Slow processing may indicate backend API issues (Metronome, timestream). [Metrics pending: requires cloud service instrumentation to be deployed]

panels.title: CPU Usage by Service
panels.description: CPU usage in cores per container, stacked. Identifies resource-heavy services.

panels.title: Memory Usage by Service
panels.description: Working set memory per container, stacked. Watch for approaching limits.

panels.title: Pod Restart Count by Container
panels.description: Per-container restart events. Spikes indicate crashes or OOM kills.

title: Union Controlplane Overview
